review_title: A must-have for scaling your business – Weblucy.
description: Weblucy meets not only my expectations as a marketer but also those of my clients, to whom I recommend it for their businesses.
author: Paulina K.
pros: Everything in one place – the perfect platform for running various types of marketing campaigns, tailored to virtually any industry.
cons: It's hard to pinpoint. Any feedback provided to Weblucy was immediately addressed or improved.

description: Using weblucy gives me a sense of security in running my business. Thanks to weblucy I feel like I am in the market and using the latest digital solutions.
author: Maciej R.
pros: I have everything in one place, on one platform. Thanks to weblucy my website sells.
cons: After 2 years of use, I don't miss anything.

description: It's a solid tool, which punches way above its weight.
author: Chris L.
pros: It actually has more features than you would think at first. It definitely shines compared to the competition.
cons: In previous versions, there was a steep learning curve, especially if you never took the time to get trained/introduced properly...

description: Weblucy is a powerful and versatile software solution that delivers on its promise of efficiency and innovation. It is particularly well-suited for businesses looking to optimize their processes, enhance customer interactions, and gain a competitive edge.
author: Anna W.
pros: Simplicity of the device, clear and concise. Weblucy is a cutting-edge software solution designed for modern businesses seeking to streamline their operations and enhance efficiency. Its intuitive interface, robust features, and scalability make it an excellent choice for companies of all sizes.
cons: In case of my page - Despite its potential, the software has not yet yielded conversions into sales.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: my overall assessment of weblucy is very positive. This tool allowed me to organize my company's marketing, everything is very intuitive here, I recommend it
author: Jan K.
pros: What I like the most is that I have all the marketing in the organization in one place
cons: in fact, as of today, I don't see any disadvantages of weblucy

author: Michał G.
pros: Simplicity, accessibility and a multitude of useful functions
cons: Every time I look for something elsewhere, it turns out that WebLucy already has it. This irritates me terribly. This ignorance of mine

review_title: Easy to use and intuitive tool for building websites
description: Weblucy has all the necessary tools to run a website. An online store, landing pages, e-mail marketing, extensive contact forms or surveys in one place allow you to effectively manage your company's image on the Internet and maintain close relationships with customers.
author: Adam W.
pros: Simple and quick construction of a modern website, built-in online store, the ability to integrate funnels and landing pages with the website, an extensive e-mail marketing module. A very useful appointment scheduling module integrated with the google calendar.
cons: The way of adding multiple images to the gallery could be improved.

description: I was very sceptical first because I didn't know the tool, however after working with it for around three months and launching different products and different websites, I need to say it's amazing easy to use, everything works, no bugs, it's stable, it's great on the different browsers, give a lot of possibilities. I am actually very surprised how well it works. It has exceeded my expectations.
author: Pawel N.
pros: easy to use, no bugs, give a lot of possibilities
cons: nothing, it'perfect, nothing more nothing less

review_title: Easy to use webpage builder with everything I need in one place
author: Paweł B.
pros: I've replaced at least five different tools thanks to WEBLUCY. All my customer data are in one place. Can run quick marketing campaign without hassle.
cons: Ecommerce is very basic but if you sell services or digital products it's more than you need.

description: My experience with Weblucy is great. My website is working well.
author: Dustin S.
pros: Service and support is always great. It was easy to create a good looking website on Weblucy and I can always count on the support team.
cons: It was hard for me to automate meeting invites the way I would like them to be, but the support team managed to make it work.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Rafał W.
pros: Soft is easy to learn even for non digital coworkers, anyone can edit all elements pictures and text. Real time effect visible. Update is visible right after changes conformation.
cons: Still you have to work on this a few times. We can say ot is user friendly but not for someone who works on computer occasionally. Interface could be corrected to be even more idiot friendly

description: I love how simple it is to create your own page with WEBLUCY. I felt like a pro in a very short time. Super easy to use, affordable, intuitive, efficient and beautiful tools.Also I loved how fast I can can make any changes. Very creative and effective service.
author: Yuliia P.
pros: I've created a land page all by myself and that was great. I love that I can manage everything myself and make any changes fast. Also WEBLUCY has a great customer service.
cons: I'm using WEBLUCY for more then 10 months and had only great experiences with it.

review_title: Wordpress to Weblucy upgrade is like switching Fiat to Ferrari
description: I will still use for years :)
author: Karol P.
pros: The support which I got from weblucy instruction videos and support center. The videos was quick, understendable and effective, so as the answers from the support.
cons: So even I rated it 4 out of 5, graphic envelope.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I am impressed, I tested several such tools and only WEBLUCY meets all my requirements.
author: Dawid M.
pros: High quality customer service, easy to use, perfect SEO optimization
cons: basically there were no such things, and if there were small shortcomings, they were quickly fixed by the WEBLUCY team

author: Bartosz S.
pros: Ease of use, great integration with other apps
cons: Nothing, it's perfect. It's so good I can't complain at all

author: Damian M.
pros: Intuitive operation; everything you need to implement!!
cons: Nothing, everything you need right now is in WebLucy!!

description: what webblucy value the most is that I have everything in one place and I don't have to use other websites, e.g. to do e-mail campaigns
author: Mateusz P.
pros: What I like the most is that it is easy and transparent to use
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Pola G.
pros: For me the most importnat is easiness of use. I`m using this platform for some time and I`m very pleased with results. It`s very intuitive which makes it quick to learn.Definitely the best help from [SENSITIVE CONTENT], easy contact, very professional, and big knowledge.
cons: I haven`t found any cons yet, maybe some will show up after longer use.
